title: Expressions, Control Flow, Iteration, Switches, and Deferred Work · Program Defense
summary: A retry policy must classify states, bound attempts, accumulate evidence, and guarantee cleanup across early returns. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a bounded retry and classification engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace arithmetic, comparison, logical, bitwise, shift, precedence, conversion, and evaluation-order guarantees from concrete values.
Use if statements with optional initializers and narrow variable scope around the decision they support.
Build bounded for loops and range loops while reasoning about copied iteration values, indexes, order, and Go 1.22 loop variables.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
